Container.Name: cardwatch
Container.Overview: CardWatch is a self-hosted monitoring dashboard for OScam servers. Connects to OScam WebIF API to track active clients, build channel mappings (CAID:SID), collect viewing statistics, and manage reader/card status. Features live view, auto-mapping from Enigma2 receivers, file sync (srvid2/services), and SK/CZ tagging.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: oscam satellite card sharing monitor dvb caid sid channel mapping stats cardwatch
Container.Changes: ## v0.1.0 - Initial release - Live view, channel mapping, viewing stats - File sync (oscam.srvid2, oscam.services) - Auto-mapping from Enigma2 receivers

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the CardWatch web interface.

Config.Name: CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to config YAML file inside the container.
